debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
h₀ : 4 ≤ n
⊢ n ^ 2 ≤ n.factorial

proof:
induction n with
  | zero => omega
  | succ n ih =>
    rcases Nat.eq_or_lt_of_le h₀ with h | h
    · have : n = 3 := by omega
      subst this; norm_num
    · have h4 : 4 ≤ n := by omega
      have ih := ih h4
      rw [Nat.factorial_succ]
      calc (n + 1) ^ 2 = (n + 1) * (n + 1) := by ring
        _ ≤ (n + 1) * n ^ 2 := by
          apply Nat.mul_le_mul_left
          nlinarith
        _ ≤ (n + 1) * n ! := by
          apply Nat.mul_le_mul_left
          exact ih
successful_attempts:
induction n with
  | zero => omega
  | succ n ih =>
    rcases Nat.eq_or_lt_of_le h₀ with h | h
    · have : n = 3 := by omega
      subst this; norm_num
    · have h4 : 4 ≤ n := by omega
      have ih := ih h4
      rw [Nat.factorial_succ]
      calc (n + 1) ^ 2 = (n + 1) * (n + 1) := by ring
        _ ≤ (n + 1) * n ^ 2 := by
          apply Nat.mul_le_mul_left
          nlinarith
        _ ≤ (n + 1) * n ! := by
          apply Nat.mul_le_mul_left
          exact ih
